title: rubus armatissimus
intro: Rubus armatissimus, also known as the armed raspberry or thorny raspberry, is a species of bramble that belongs to the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits associated with Rubus armatissimus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
